body:
sophsknight:

nothing makes me go more feral than a nerdy little lesbian… like yes, baby, tell me all about your nerdy little superhero movies and your nerdy little animes and your nerdy little sword collection while i look at you with adoring eyes and try very hard not to tear your clothes off and fuck you senseless

trail.content: nothing makes me go more feral than a nerdy little lesbian… like yes, baby, tell me all about your nerdy little superhero movies and your nerdy little animes and your nerdy little sword collection while i look at you with adoring eyes and try very hard not to tear your clothes off and fuck you senseless
